sub_agent_reviews.summary: Single Scout covered llm-agent, llm-post-training, and ai-safety; RA-RFT selected after same-day dedupe.
Read arXiv HTML/PDF/source and extracted method, formulas, tables, ablations, figures, limits.
Explained gold-relevance distillation, retriever training, RLVR loop, reward verification, and transfer risks.
Marked judge-label, retrieval uncertainty, corpus trace, compute cost, and non-math transfer boundaries.
Searched external references; no richer third-party technical analysis found beyond aggregators.
Article uses Markdown tables, math blocks, Mermaid, and bullet-heavy sections; no external images embedded.
